title: Classify Heim-PC wide listeners
goal: Classify and, where appropriate, narrow wide Heim-PC listeners including Unifi, Sunshine, GNOME Remote Desktop, Leitstand and Caddy.

acceptance.assertion: Every listener on 0.0.0.0 or * has an owner, purpose, expected network scope and exposure boundary.
Unmanaged preview servers are either stopped or moved behind explicit local-only/dev-only commands.
Any port binding or firewall change is made only after preserving required LAN/Tailnet functions.

metadata.live_audit_finding: unmanaged commonworld http.server on 0.0.0.0:4173 was stopped; remaining wide listeners need policy classification.
